description: Per-category precision/recall baseline for the review-quality regression gate (#143). The gate (pnpm eval:gate) blocks if any category's precision or recall drops beyond its threshold vs this file. Promote via: pnpm eval:baseline --apply (requires deliberate opt-in).

thresholds.comment: Regression is detected when current metric < baseline metric - threshold. Values in [0, 1]. Default ±5% = 0.05 for all categories unless overridden.

current.comment: Null until the operator runs `pnpm eval:baseline --apply` for the first time. A null baseline is treated as unmeasured: the gate reports scores but does not block.
